title: NIO Inc (NIO) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Nine analysts covering NIO stock have consensus rating of Buy with average price target of $6.73, forecasting 5.32% upside over next year. NIO forecast to grow earnings and revenue 73.3% and 18.8% per annum respectively. EPS expected to grow 71.5% per annum. In current month, NIO received 4 Buy Ratings, 5 Hold Ratings, 1 Sell Rating. NIO guided Q1 2026 deliveries 80,000-83,000 vehicles (90.1%-97.2% year-over-year increase), reiterated full-year volume growth target of 40%-50%. Management presented disciplined cost controls with R&D and SG&A declines and confident volume outlook. Q4 2025 results showed 124,807 deliveries, RMB 34.7 billion revenue (+75.9% YoY), RMB 1.25 billion adjusted operating profit with positive free cash flow for two consecutive quarters.
